name: Pasta with Green Beans, Potatoes and Pesto
recipeIngredient: 2 Yukon gold potatoes, peeled and parboiled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, gently heat the oil over low heat.
2. Quickly sauté the green beans until they are tender.
3. Add the potatoes, pasta, and pesto to the pot.
4. Cook everything together for about 10 minutes, or until it is warm and all ingredients are well combined.
5. Stir in the toasted walnuts.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve topped with grated Parmesan cheese.
